title: Nine Sects and Thirteen Factions
content:
The 
Nine Sects and Thirteen Factions
 are the 21 most powerful 
Celestial
 sects on the 
Eastern Continent
 of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
.

Strength
[
]

Each of the 21 Sects are all extremely powerful, with multiple 
Void Tribulant
 cultivators in their ranks. To the rest of the Immortal Astral Continent, Arcane Void would be a powerful level, but to them it is simply not much. While a large Sect would have a Middle Stage Void Tribulant Master, these Sects have plenty of Cultivators at that level. The Sect Ancestors are at least at the Golden Exalt level, while Sect Masters are at least Late Stage Void Tribulant. The Purple Sun Sect even possesses a 
Grand Empyrean
, Gemini, who was considered the strongest Grand Empyrean before she split into two during her latest reincarnation cycle.
